title: Burnham blueprint for national renewal
description: Letter: Andy Burnham has a rare commitment to co-designing policy alongside experts and communities, says Kate Pickett
content:

title: Trump blames Iran for drone strike on cargo ship in strait of Hormuz
description: US president calls it ‘foolish violation’ of ceasefire agreement after drone damaged ship’s upper deck
content:
Donald Trump on Friday blamed Iran for carrying out a drone strike on a cargo ship in the strait of Hormuz, calling it a “foolish violation” of the ceasefire agreement with the US.
One drone damaged the upper deck of the ship but the ship was able to... [1716 chars]

title: US rapist who fled to Scotland after appearing to fake own death dies in hospital
description: Nicholas Rossi died due to complications from a medical condition while serving jail sentence in Utah
content:
Nicholas Rossi, the American rapist who absconded to Scotland after appearing to fake his own death in an attempt to evade justice, has died in hospital in the US.
The 38-year-old had been serving a jail sentence in Utah after being found guilty of r... [2920 chars]

title: World Cup scouting report: the lowdown on England’s next opponents Panama
description: Did you enjoy England’s stalemate against Ghana? Panama are just as seasoned in the art of footballing nihilism
content:
Panama apparently have nothing to play for when they face England in New Jersey on Saturday. After an attritional 1-0 loss to Ghana in their opener, and a slightly unlucky 1-0 defeat by Croatia, there is no path to the knockouts for Los Canaleros.

description: New jetbikes, grav vehicles and Dreadnoughts revealed for Warhammer 40,000 AND Warhammer: The Horus Heresy.
content:

The new Custodes Support Battle Group box adds three elite units from different divisions of the Ten Thousand to your army, consisting of four Gyrfalcon Jetbikes, a Pallas Grav-attack, and a Telemon Heavy Dreadnought.
